name: plugin-improver
description: Single-plugin marketplace for plugin-improver: audit, tune, and evolve Claude Code and Codex plugins, and curate the whole skill+plugin inventory.

plugins.name: plugin-improver
plugins.description: Audit, tune, and evolve Claude Code and Codex plugins - and curate the whole skill+plugin inventory: score plugin health, sharpen trigger descriptions, repair lifecycle hooks, run non-regressing improvement passes, and detect skill sprawl, trigger collisions, duplicate installs, and plugin version drift across Claude Code and Codex.
